questions.objective_ref: Explain what an ADR is and why professional teams write them.
Name the five standard sections of an ADR: Title, Status, Context, Decision, and Consequences.
Write the Context section of an AI ADR by mapping a domain problem onto the decision matrix from 14.7.
Write the Decision section by naming the chosen tier and the primary reason in plain language.
Write the Consequences section by naming the cost-latency-quality trade-off the chosen tier introduces.
